[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111101111 8
1 1100000111 5
2 0101111101 7
3 0010001000 2
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000010001 2
7 0010100000 2

01 10 0010000000 1
12 21 1000100000 2
23 32 0100110000 3
34 43 0110101010 5
45 54 0100000111 4
56 65 0100000101 3
67 76 0000001000 1
70 07 0010000000 1

02 20 0000010001 2 match 6
13 31 0010100000 2 match 7
24 42 0100100001 3
35 53 0100000010 2
46 64 0101101101 6
57 75 0000000000 a match 4 5
60 06 0000010001 2 match 6
71 17 0010000000 1

03 30 0010010010 3
14 41 0010100100 3
25 52 1100000001 3
36 63 0100111000 4
47 74 0010001000 2 match 3
50 05 0000000011 2
61 16 0000100100 2
72 27 0000000000 a match 4 5

04 40 0010000011 3
15 51 1000000100 2
26 62 0100110001 4
37 73 0010001000 2 match 3
